articles.title: IMD forecast warns of widespread rain and storms in these states: How India’s changing weather may impact travellers
articles.description: India's weather is set for unpredictable conditions over the next two weeks, with thunderstorms, showers, and localized heatwaves impacting travel. Northern regions face isolated showers and strong winds, while East and Northeast India anticipate heavy rains. Southern states will experience continuous rainfall, and sporadic heatwave conditions are possible in Rajasthan.

articles.title: Sun Pharma explores funding mix for $12 billion Organon deal
articles.description: Global lenders are exploring various financing options for Sun Pharmaceutical Industries' proposed $12 billion acquisition of Organon & Co. The Indian drugmaker is considering swapping Organon bondholders into Sun Pharma debt and a potential euro-denominated bond. Additionally, Sun Pharma plans to raise $3 billion to $4 billion in offshore loans, with deal approvals anticipated by December.

articles.title: ‘Not censorship’: India responds sharply to NYT op-ed
articles.description: India’s Ambassador Vinay Mohan Kwatra rejects NYT op-ed claims of censorship, saying IT rules focus on platform accountability and misinformation control.

articles.title: High TPC levels! Dark, degraded oil found in popular fast food chain: Study explains its impact on your health
articles.description: A recent food safety scare has put the spotlight on reused cooking oil risks after a KFC outlet in Kondapur, Hyderabad was reportedly found using degraded oil with unsafe Total Polar Compounds (TPC) levels during an inspection. Repeated heating of oil increases TPC, making it harmful, with the Food Safety and Standards Authority of India setting a 25% safety limit. High TPC levels are linked to serious health risks like hypertension, heart disease, and liver damage, raising concerns over food safety practices in fast food chains.

This ability to express oneself is the first step towards personal growth and societal change.

articles.title: Fear vs facts: Why nuclear power's revival is crucial for a cleaner, secure energy future
articles.description: Despite past fears from Chernobyl and Fukushima, nuclear energy is re-emerging as a reliable, clean power source. France's reliance showcases low emissions, while Germany's shutdown increased fossil fuel use. Modern reactors boast enhanced safety features, and global expansion is underway with new designs like SMRs promising efficiency and a smaller environmental footprint.

articles.description: The post, which has been circulating widely online, puts spotlight on how interest in Indian mango varieties continues to rise, even outside the country.

articles.title: Market Strategy Now: Where Should You Invest? | Shweta Rajani Explains
articles.description: The market is stuck in a tight range, but opportunities are quietly building beneath the surface. As the Nifty hovers between 23,900 and 24,400, the real action is shifting to the broader markets. Midcaps and smallcaps are clearly outperforming, backed by strong Q4 earnings momentum. Shweta Rajani of Anand Rathi Wealth highlights that while large caps delivered a muted ~6% growth, mid and small caps are clocking an impressive 30–40% profit growth so far. Banking and financials remain steady contributors, while sectoral trends are becoming more stock-specific. The key strategy now is balance - allocating smartly across market caps and staying invested for the long term. With valuations in a fair zone and earnings visibility improving, disciplined investing - not timing the market - remains the winning approach.

articles.title: Marico Q4 net profit rises 14% to Rs 391 crore
articles.description: Consolidated reveue from operations rose 22 per cent to Rs 3,333 crore in Q4, up from Rs 2,730 crore, reported last year. However, on a sequential basis, revenue fell from Rs 3,537 crore reported in Q3, the company said in a regulatory filing on May 5.
